publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-02-04 23:14:42 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, pamphlets, evaluations, clippings, articles and other materials.
did.abstract: Includes files involving Peace Corps activities at Cornell,and Blanchard Rideout's role in Frank Rhodes' inaugeration and as marshall for the 1971-1979 commencement ceremonies. Also correspondence with Morris Bishop, and drafts of his memorial statement which Blanchard wrote, including an explanation of the quote found on the memorial plaque to Bishop in Sage Chapel.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also Cornell University Banners, Clothing, and Other Textiles, #47-7-3439, for Rideout's graduation regalia.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Blanchard Rideout papers, #34-8-1033. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes files involving Peace Corps activities at Cornell and Blanchard Rideout's role in Frank Rhodes' inauguration and as marshall for the 1971-1979 commencement ceremonies. Also correspondence with Morris Bishop, and drafts of his memorial statement which Blanchard wrote, including an explanation of the quote found on the memorial plaque to Bishop in Sage Chapel. Also a box of material, sub collection #8-1-1445, about Peace Corps Project Peru RCA that contains financial documents, biographies of participants, photographs, training material, and correspondence.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 5 restricted to the permission of the University Archivist.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 5 restricted to the permission of the University Archivist.
